name: Dietrich & Sons Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private Passenger Business; Authorized for Hire
fmcsa_address: Valley City, ND (831 13th Ave SE per ND Sec of State / D&B)
entity_status: Active & Good Standing (ND Sec of State, per third-party directories)
registry_source: North Dakota Secretary of State (via D&B / northdakota.ltddir.com aggregators)
notes: Dietrich & Sons Inc holds USDOT 230163 / MC-166269 (per BrokerSnapshot); USDOT 230163 is currently INACTIVE in SAFER. Fleet composition per bubba.ai: 6 motor coaches, 111 school buses (16+), 19 buses (16+), 3 vans (1-8); total 139 units; 120 drivers (last MCS-150 dated 2007-01-25). Operates as 'Dietrich Bus Service' (separate FMCSA filing USDOT 700655 / MC-324293, also now INACTIVE as of June 2026; CarrierAtlas historical: 125 power units, 125 drivers). Provides school bus and private transportation service in SE North Dakota. Valley City Public Schools rejected Dietrich's bid for 2024-25 school year (had paid $615K for 2023-24). Address: 831 13th Ave SE, Valley City, ND 58072. Estimated ~175 total employees, ~$24.6M annual revenue (D&B estimates).
